Short Conditioning (Reduced-load)
15-25 min • Keep intensity capped, finish the first useful block, and stop there. • 15-20 min easy conditioning or brisk walk
WHAT HAPPENED
Skipped
Travel friction and soreness made the saved recovery reset the right call.
WHY IT MATTERED
Schedule travel got in the way, so consistency mattered more than precision.
WHAT CHANGES NEXT
Treat this as a missed stimulus and move forward without trying to cram it back in.
